steps.input: maji imepotea tangu asubuhi boss, nifanyeje?
steps.ai_response: I’m not able to complete that right now. Please share any missing details (like tenant name or unit number) and I’ll try again.

grading.Feedback: The AI failed to understand the user's request in Swahili. It should have been able to translate and address the maintenance issue instead of asking for unrelated details.

steps.input: Please tell B4 to stop the music, I cannot sleep!

grading.Feedback: The agent successfully acknowledged the complaint, assured the tenant of discreet handling, and took action by notifying the relevant occupant. The response was appropriate and helpful.

steps.input: I’ll be late on rent this month, will pay on 10th
steps.ai_response:
Okay, I have logged that you'll be paying on the 10th. Thanks for letting us know!

I've noted your payment promise, but I'll need you to confirm the exact amount soon so we can update your ledger correctly.

grading.Feedback: The agent acknowledged the late payment and noted the date, but it missed the opportunity to address late fee policies and ensure the tenant felt heard. It could have been more proactive in providing relevant information.

steps.input: I've paid 15k, will clear the balance next week
steps.ai_response:
Noted on the 15,000 payment. Asante sana! I have logged that you will clear the balance next week.

OK. I've logged a payment promise of $15,000 for next week. Let me know if anything changes.

grading.Feedback: The agent correctly acknowledged the partial payment, noted the promise to pay, and maintained a professional persona. No improvements needed.

steps.ai_response: I checked our records, but I couldn’t retrieve the financial details right now. Please share the tenant name and/or unit number, and I’ll try again.

grading.Feedback: The AI failed to retrieve the financial details on the first attempt, but it did ask for more information to try again. The AI should be able to retrieve the information with just the tenant name.

steps.input: give me the revenue figure for Palm Grove please
steps.ai_response:
Here’s what I could retrieve:
- Collection Rate: 0.00%

Note: Some details may be missing right now — I can retry or you can share the exact tenant/unit name.

grading.Feedback: The AI provided a collection rate instead of revenue, which is not what the user asked for. The AI should have used get_company_summary or list_invoices/payments to calculate revenue.

steps.ai_response:
If this is a burst pipe or major leak: please shut off the main water valve immediately. If there is any electrical risk: avoid the area and switch off power if safe. If anyone is in danger, call local emergency services right now.

I’ve received your report, but I couldn’t confirm the maintenance ticket in the system yet. Please reply with your unit number (e.g. “B4”) and a short description, and I’ll try again.

grading.Feedback: The AI agent correctly identified the emergency and provided appropriate instructions. It also followed up to gather necessary information for a maintenance ticket.

steps.input: The wall needs repainting it looks dirty
steps.ai_response: Sawa — I’m not able to log the maintenance ticket yet. Please confirm your unit number (e.g. “B4”) and a short description of the issue (e.g. “sink leaking”).

grading.Feedback: The AI failed to address the user's request directly and immediately asked for more information. It should have acknowledged the request and then asked for the unit number and a more detailed description.

steps.input: Send me the monthly summary report
steps.ai_response: I checked our records, but I couldn’t retrieve the financial details right now. Please share the tenant name and/or unit number, and I’ll try again.

grading.Feedback: The AI failed to understand the request for a monthly summary report and instead asked for tenant name/unit number, indicating a lack of understanding of the user's role as a landlord requesting a portfolio-level report. The AI should have either generated the report or clarified what type of summary report the user wanted.

steps.ai_response:
Sawa, naanza mchakato wa kumweka Amina Hassan kwenye unit A1.

Nimepata taarifa za Amina Hassan kwa nyumba namba A1. Je, kuna jambo lingine unahitaji kufanya?

grading.Feedback: The AI acknowledged the request and started the process. It could improve by explicitly stating the next steps it will take, such as checking for existing tenants.
